title: filago gallica var. longibracteata
intro: Filago gallica var. longibracteata, also known as the long-bracted fleabane, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with its medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Filago gallica var. longibracteata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
